detail.instructions: Keep the borrowed log entry and view code, then add LogLevel variants Info, Warn, and Error. Implement severity with a match on level.

hints.body: Enums pair well with match because every known case can be handled directly.
The severity function should return a small integer for each variant.
A match expression is clearer than string comparisons for typed log levels.

detail.completionExplanation: Pattern matching keeps the mapping exhaustive and visible. Adding a new log level later will naturally point maintainers at this decision.
